name: medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, unresolved patient billing disputes cause cash flow gaps. We monitor disputes and flag unresolved cases instead of manual tracking of billing disputes.
problem_solved: Unresolved patient billing disputes leading to cash flow gaps.
